title: Composting properly
problem: The soil is sandy and loses moisture quickly, so we need a steady source of organic matter.
goal: Create a simple compost routine that improves soil structure and teaches the group what can and cannot be composted.
notes: This is the natural next epic after the first plantings.

title: Watering rhythm
problem: Fast drainage means crops can dry out before the team notices.
goal: Define a weekly watering check and record what plants look like before and after watering.
notes: Useful for future learning cards about sandy soil and Hamburg weather.

title: Progress photo habit
problem: Good work happens in the garden but is easy to forget if nobody documents it.
goal: Take before, during and after photos for each epic using the same simple naming pattern.
notes: This will make the website, blog and marketing much stronger.

title: Plant labels in three languages
problem: Visitors can see plants but may not know their names or purpose.
goal: Create simple ES/EN/DE labels with common name, scientific name and one useful care tip.
notes: Connects directly with the learning-card library.
